title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.497 - Verification board to convene, when
text:
115.497.  Verification board to convene, when. — As soon as practicable after each election, the election authority shall convene a verification board to verify the count and certify the results of the election.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 12.130) 
Effective 1-01-78
